Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 12th August, 2016 G.S.R. 792(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the All India Service Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), read with sub-rule 2 of Rule 4 of Indian Forest Service (Cadre) Rules, 1966, the Central Government in consultation with the Government of Maharashtra hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the Indian Forest Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1966, namely :- 1. (i) These regulations shall be called the Indian Forest Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Amendment Regulations, 2016. (ii) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2.
